reasoning: Query is quiet meditation temple. 71 hits include Shugyō-ji, 修行院, 曼殊院 (good), but mid-list flooded with unrelated National Treasures (与宗悟大姉法語, 庖丁正宗, 無量義経) which are documents/swords not temples. reasoning: Query is aurora in Japan — physically only viable in northern Hokkaido (rare). Server returned 80 noisy hits (Oita business site, Sanrio Puroland, DMO docs, Okinawa botanical garden) clearly irrelevant. No safety_keywords_detected for the impossibility-of-aurora-in-most-of-Japan signal. Composition layer would struggle.

reasoning: get_hotels prefecture=Gifu returns hito_yu_kai onsen ryokan (湯元すぎ嶋, 朝日荘, 槍見館) and Airbnb/hostel rows.
